failure_reason: Added .bml source support for focused decimal and exponent BML float spellings across native file scanning, Form text scanning, BML AST, BMA execution, native f64 decode, and backward restoration. Initial proof run exposed proof helper floor naming and missing Rust/TS float_value parity; fixed both and reran to pass with float literal proof 67108863, numeric literal proof 1073741823, and file execution proof 131071.
